message:
ext(icu): implement bd-jzjn Unicode collation, case mapping, and tokenization

Add full ICU extension (§14.6) with locale-aware collation (UCA subset
with German/Swedish/Turkish/Spanish tailoring), case mapping (icu_upper/
icu_lower with Turkish dotted-I, German sharp-s, Greek final sigma),
icu_load_collation for dynamic collation registration, and UAX#29
word-break tokenizer with CJK character-level segmentation. 29 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
